goal_text:
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should be in the 'north' and should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should be in the north and should include free wifi
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
